title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ca-certificates bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ca-certificates is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The ca-certificates package contains a set of Certificate Authority (CA) certificates chosen by the Mozilla Foundation for use with the Internet Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 (JIRA:RHEL-118482)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 (JIRA:RHEL-118483)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118484)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118485)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118486)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages (JIRA:RHEL-119837)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119838)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119839)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119840)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages (JIRA:RHEL-123579)

full_text:
An update for ca-certificates is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The ca-certificates package contains a set of Certificate Authority (CA) certificates chosen by the Mozilla Foundation for use with the Internet Public Key Infrastructure (PKI).Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 (JIRA:RHEL-118482)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 (JIRA:RHEL-118483)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118484)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118485)  Annual 2025 ca-certificates update version 2.80 from NSS 3.114 for Firefox 140 and Microsoft v9.0.304 [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-118486)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages (JIRA:RHEL-119837)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages [rhel-9.4.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119838)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119839)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-119840)  ca-certificates: Add libffi and findutils to required packages (JIRA:RHEL-123579)
